overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 follows a character with pink hair through a dense, foggy cyberpunk district at dusk. The environment transitions from open neon-lit streets with heavy atmospheric haze to covered food courts and narrow back alleys, featuring pervasive Japanese and English signage, street vendors, and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy cyberpunk street intersection with dense neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking through the foggy street intersection, approaching crosswalks and observing neon-lit buildings

notable_agents.action: muscular pedestrian in white tank top and sunglasses walking toward camera then passing by

entered.detail: multi-story building covered in colorful neon advertisements and Japanese characters
tall building with prominent purple neon HOTEL signage
dense network of power cables and wires crisscrossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a foggy cyberpunk street corner bathed in warm neon light. The camera moves forward through the intersection, passing a muscular pedestrian in a white tank top, with towering buildings covered in Japanese and English neon signage visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along main road with hotel and street vendors

events.description: crossing the street as a black vehicle passes by and traffic light changes

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk, then crossing the street while navigating around vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan driving along the street and stopping at the intersection
pedestrian with bright red hair standing near the crosswalk, looking at the street

entered.detail: metal guardrail separating sidewalk from the street below
street food cart with blue neon lighting and cooking equipment
wall covered in green and red graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sidewalk bordered by a metal railing, passing a prominent purple HOTEL sign. At approximately 16 seconds, they cross the street as a black futuristic vehicle passes by, approaching a corner with a food vendor stall and graffiti-covered walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway descending to lower level food court

events.description: entering covered walkway from open street, passing under overhead structure
descending ramp leading down to lower level food court area

agents.ego_description: entering a covered area and descending a ramp into a lower-level food court, passing a vendor stall

notable_agents.action: food vendor in white shirt and apron working at a stall with blue neon lighting

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure providing cover from the weather
concrete ramp leading downward to a lower pedestrian level
illuminated cyan arrow sign pointing direction

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered walkway at 22 seconds, passing a food vendor working under blue neon light. They then descend a concrete ramp around 28 seconds, transitioning from the open hazy street to a sheltered lower-level area with overhead structures and directional neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor food court with ramen shop and dining areas

agents.ego_description: walking through the food court, passing diners seated at tables and observing the various food stalls

notable_agents.action: group of diners sitting at round table eating and drinking near the ramen shop
chef working behind the food counter preparing meals

entered.detail: large circular purple neon sign with Japanese characters for ramen and food imagery
round tables with red plastic chairs where patrons are eating
blue and white arcade game cabinet with warning symbols

segments.scene_description: The character explores an enclosed food court illuminated by artificial lighting and neon signs. A prominent purple ramen shop sign glows on the right, while patrons sit at tables eating. The area features an arcade machine, food counters, and hanging paper lanterns creating an intimate, bustling atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with back entrances and dumpsters

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow back alleys with service entrances, passing dumpsters and scattered trash

entered.detail: large green industrial dumpsters and trash bags piled along the wall
metal door and service entrance to buildings with security grates
multiple hanging neon signs with arrows and Japanese text pointing directions

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through narrow, dimly lit service alleys away from the busy food court. The environment features industrial elements like dumpsters, graffiti-covered walls, and service entrances, with neon directional signs providing the primary illumination in this enclosed back corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy, neon-lit district that transitions from open city streets into a sheltered food court and finally into secluded service alleys. It begins at a hazy intersection bathed in warm light, moving past towering buildings and pedestrians under a canopy of Japanese and English signage. As the camera follows the character along a metal railing and across a street with passing futuristic vehicles, the scene shifts toward a corner marked by graffiti and food stalls. The perspective then descends a concrete ramp, moving from the open atmospheric haze into a semi-covered walkway and an enclosed food court filled with glowing ramen signs, paper lanterns, and dining patrons. Finally, the camera turns away from the bustling hub to navigate narrow, dimly lit back corridors characterized by industrial dumpsters and graffiti-covered walls.
